Boston Holdroom Journeys

6,242 people who passed through BOSHOLD between Jan 20, 2025 (Trump-2 inauguration) and Mar 10, 2026, traced through every subsequent ICE facility. Click a person to draw their path.
See https://github.com/JonGerhardson/JonGerhardson.github.io/tree/main/boshold/README.md for details and credits for the underlying data.
